json-formatter.name: JSON Formatter
json-formatter.description: Format, validate, and explore JSON with Monaco Editor, interactive tree view, and JSON Path filtering — all in your browser.
json-formatter.metaTitle: JSON Formatter & Validator Online - Pretty Print, Tree View, Minify
json-formatter.metaDescription: Free online JSON formatter with Monaco Editor, interactive tree view, JSON Path filtering, and real-time validation. Format, minify, and explore JSON data — 100% browser-based, no data uploaded.

f1.title: Monaco Editor — Code Like in VS Code
f1.description: Full-featured code editor with syntax highlighting, bracket matching, code folding, and auto-completion. The same editor that powers VS Code.

f2.title: Interactive Tree View Explorer
f2.description: Navigate complex JSON structures visually. Expand, collapse, and inspect nested objects and arrays with item counts at every level.

f3.title: Real-Time Validation as You Type
f3.description: Instant syntax checking with live Valid/Invalid status indicator. Catch errors before they reach production.

f4.title: JSON Path Filtering
f4.description: Query specific values using JSON Path expressions like $.address.city or $.items[0]. Drill into deeply nested data instantly.

f5.title: Resizable Split Pane Layout
f5.description: Drag the divider to customize editor and viewer proportions. Double-click to reset to 50/50. Adapts to mobile with stacked layout.

f6.title: 100% Private — Zero Server Uploads
f6.description: All processing happens in your browser. Your JSON data never leaves your device — safe for API keys, tokens, and sensitive configs.

faq.q1: What does this JSON formatter do?
faq.a1: It provides a full-featured JSON editing environment with Monaco Editor (the engine behind VS Code), interactive tree view, real-time validation, pretty-printing with customizable indentation, minification, and JSON Path filtering — all running 100% in your browser.
faq.q2: Is my JSON data safe and private?
faq.a2: Absolutely. All processing happens entirely in your browser using native JavaScript. Your data never leaves your device — no server uploads, no logging, no third-party access. Safe for API keys, tokens, and sensitive configuration data.
faq.q3: How is this different from other online JSON formatters?
faq.a3: Unlike basic text-area formatters, this tool features a professional Monaco Editor with code folding and bracket matching, an interactive tree view for visual exploration, JSON Path filtering to query nested data, and a resizable split pane — comparable to desktop-grade JSON tools, but entirely in your browser.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline including the Monaco Editor, tree view, and all formatting features. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.q5: What JSON Path expressions are supported?
faq.a5: The tool supports dot notation ($.address.city), bracket notation for arrays ($.items[0]), and nested paths ($.data.users[2].name). Enter your path in the filter box above the tree view to instantly drill into specific data.

intro.title: Professional JSON Formatter & Viewer
intro.content:
JSON Formatter is a free, professional-grade JSON tool that combines a Monaco code editor, interactive tree view, and real-time validation in one interface. Paste messy or minified JSON and instantly get clean, human-readable output with syntax highlighting, code folding, and visual tree exploration.

Whether you're debugging API responses, inspecting deeply nested data structures, reviewing configuration files, or preparing data for documentation — this tool gives you everything you need without leaving your browser or uploading a single byte.

howToUse.title: How to Use JSON Formatter
howToUse.content:
1. Paste or type JSON into the Monaco Editor on the left — or drag and drop a .json file
  2. The tool validates in real-time and shows Valid or Invalid status instantly
  3. Click Format to pretty-print with your chosen indentation, or Minify to compress
  4. Switch to Tree view to visually explore the structure, or Code view for syntax-highlighted output
  5. Use the JSON Path filter (e.g., $.data.users[0]) to drill into specific values
  6. Copy or download the result with one click

features.title: Key Features
features.content:
• Monaco Editor: The same code editor that powers VS Code — with syntax highlighting, bracket matching, code folding, and word wrap
  • Interactive Tree View: Expand and collapse JSON nodes visually, with item counts at every level and full keyboard navigation
  • JSON Path Filtering: Query specific values using path expressions like $.address.city or $.items[0].name
  • Real-Time Validation: Instant syntax checking as you type — no need to click a button
  • Pretty Print & Minify: Format with customizable indentation (2, 4, or 8 spaces) or compress to a single line
  • Drag-and-Drop File Support: Drop .json or .txt files directly into the editor
  • Resizable Split Pane: Drag the divider to balance editor and viewer space; double-click to reset
  • Syntax-Highlighted Code View: Color-coded output with line numbers for easy copy-paste
  • 100% Browser-Based: No server uploads — your data stays on your device, always

useCases.title: Common Use Cases
useCases.content:
• API Development & Debugging: Paste raw API responses, format them instantly, and use the tree view to navigate deeply nested objects
  • Configuration Files: Clean up package.json, tsconfig.json, .eslintrc, or Kubernetes manifests
  • Data Exploration: Use JSON Path to filter large datasets and find specific values without scrolling through thousands of lines
  • Code Reviews: Compare JSON structures visually with the tree view to spot differences quickly
  • Documentation: Format and export well-structured JSON examples for technical docs and tutorials
  • Database Records: Inspect and format JSON stored in MongoDB, CouchDB, or PostgreSQL JSONB columns

privacy.title: Privacy-First JSON Processing
privacy.content:
Your JSON data is processed entirely in your browser using native JavaScript parsing and the Monaco Editor engine. No data is transmitted to any server — ever.

  • Your data never leaves your device — zero network requests during processing
  • Safe for sensitive API keys, authentication tokens, and configuration secrets
  • Works completely offline after the page loads — no internet required
  • No analytics on your JSON content — we track tool usage, never your data

f1.title: Visual Tree Editing
f1.description: Double-click keys or values to edit in place. Right-click for a full context menu: insert, duplicate, delete, change type, copy path.

f2.title: Undo / Redo History
f2.description: Every change is recorded. Press Ctrl+Z to undo and Ctrl+Y to redo. Experiment freely without fear of breaking your data.

f3.title: Auto-Repair Invalid JSON
f3.description: Pasted JSON with trailing commas, single quotes, or comments? One click repairs common mistakes so you can start editing immediately.

f4.title: Three View Modes
f4.description: Switch anytime between Text (Monaco), Tree (interactive editing), and Preview (read-only syntax-highlighted) — one editor, three ways to work.

f5.title: Type Switching
f5.description: Convert any value between string, number, boolean, null, object, and array with one click. Perfect for quickly reshaping test data or configs.

f6.title: 100% Private — No Uploads
f6.description: All editing happens in your browser. Your JSON never touches a server — safe for API keys, tokens, and sensitive configurations.

faq.q1: How is this different from a JSON formatter?
faq.a1: A formatter only re-indents and validates text. This editor lets you modify the structure itself — add, delete, rename, and retype nodes visually without writing a single character of JSON syntax. It's ideal for editing config files, crafting test data, or fixing API responses.
faq.q2: Is my JSON data safe and private?
faq.a2: Absolutely. All editing, parsing, repair, and diff computation happens entirely in your browser. Your data never leaves your device — no server uploads, no logging, no third-party access. Safe for API keys, tokens, and sensitive configuration data.
faq.a3: Auto Repair uses the jsonrepair library to fix common mistakes: trailing commas, single quotes instead of double quotes, missing quotes around keys, JavaScript-style comments, smart/curly quotes, concatenated strings, and more. It's based on the same repair engine used by many popular JSON tools.
faq.q4: Can I switch between text and tree editing?
faq.a4: Yes. Use the view switcher at the top to change between Text (Monaco editor), Tree (interactive structure editor), and Preview (read-only syntax-highlighted) modes. Any change in one mode is immediately reflected when you switch to another — as long as your JSON is valid.
faq.a5: Yes. Once the page loads, everything works offline — editing, auto-repair, diff comparison, and export. Install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser for quickest access.

intro.title: Visual JSON Editor for Developers
intro.content:
JSON Editor is a browser-based JSON editor with three view modes: Text for raw editing with Monaco Editor, Tree for visual structure editing, and Preview for read-only syntax-highlighted display.

In Tree mode, double-click a key or value to edit it in place. Right-click any node for the full context menu: insert before or after, duplicate, change type, delete, copy path. Undo and redo are available at every step. When you paste invalid JSON, one click repairs common mistakes like trailing commas, single quotes, and JavaScript comments.

howToUse.title: How to Use JSON Editor
howToUse.content:
1. Paste, type, or drop a .json file into the editor
  2. If the JSON is invalid, click Auto Repair to fix common mistakes
  3. Use the view switcher to pick Text, Tree, or Preview mode
  4. In Tree mode: double-click any key or value to edit in place; right-click for insert/duplicate/delete/change type/copy path
  5. Use Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y to undo and redo
  6. Click Format, Minify, or Smart to reformat, then Download or Copy to export

features.title: Key Features
features.content:
• Three View Modes: Text (Monaco), Tree (interactive), Preview (read-only) — switch anytime
  • Visual Tree Editing: Double-click any key or value, right-click for the full context menu
  • Full Type Switching: Convert any value between string, number, boolean, null, object, and array
  • Undo / Redo: 50-step history with Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y shortcuts
  • Auto Repair: Fixes trailing commas, single quotes, missing quotes, JavaScript comments, and more
  • Smart Format: Inline short arrays/objects, expand long ones — compact yet readable
  • Monaco Editor: The same code editor that powers VS Code, for raw text editing
  • Path Display & Copy: Click any node to see and copy its JSON Path
  • 100% Browser-Based: No server uploads — your data stays on your device

useCases.title: Common Use Cases
useCases.content:
• Config File Editing: Safely modify package.json, tsconfig.json, or Kubernetes manifests without syntax errors
  • Test Data Crafting: Quickly build fixtures by duplicating nodes, changing types, and renaming keys
  • API Response Debugging: Paste a response, restructure it, and diff against the expected shape
  • Schema Migration: Compare two versions of a JSON document to see exactly what changed
  • Fixing Broken JSON: Use Auto Repair to recover from trailing commas, stray quotes, or mixed delimiters
  • Data Cleanup: Delete unwanted fields in bulk with right-click + Delete, then export the cleaned data

privacy.title: Privacy-First JSON Editing
privacy.content:
Every edit, repair, and diff runs entirely in your browser. Your JSON is never uploaded or logged anywhere.

  • Data never leaves your device — zero network requests during editing
  • Safe for sensitive API keys, tokens, and configuration secrets
  • Works completely offline after the page loads
  • No analytics on your JSON content — we only track tool usage, never data

base64.name: Base64 Encode/Decode
base64.description: Encode text or files to Base64, decode Base64 back. Supports URL-safe variant and Data URI.
base64.metaTitle: Base64 Encoder/Decoder - Text & File, URL-Safe | Free Online Tool
base64.metaDescription: Encode text or files to Base64, decode Base64 to text or files. URL-safe Base64, Data URI output, image preview. Free, in-browser.
base64.keywords: base64 encode, base64 decode, base64 converter, file to base64, base64 to file, data uri, url safe base64, base64 image, base64 online
base64.pasteBase64ToDecodeFile: Paste a Base64 string to decode as a file...
base64.detectedAsBase64: Input looks like Base64 — switched to Decode

faq.a1: Base64 is a binary-to-text encoding scheme that converts binary data into ASCII characters. It's commonly used in data URLs, email attachments, and API payloads.
faq.a2: Yes. Switch to the File tab to encode any file (images, PDFs, ZIPs, etc.) to Base64. You can also decode a Base64 string back to a downloadable file.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your data never leaves your device — nothing is uploaded to any server.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.
faq.a6: URL-safe Base64 (RFC 4648 section 5) replaces + with - and / with _, and omits padding =. It's commonly used in JWT tokens, URL parameters, and filenames.

intro.title: What is Base64 Encoder/Decoder?
intro.content:
Base64 Encoder/Decoder converts text and files to Base64 encoding and back. Base64 is a binary-to-text encoding scheme commonly used to embed data in URLs, emails, HTML, and JSON where binary data isn't supported.

Encode text or any file (images, PDFs, ZIPs) to Base64, or decode Base64 strings back to text or downloadable files — all in your browser, with URL-safe variant and Data URI support.

howToUse.title: How to Use Base64 Encoder/Decoder
howToUse.content:
1. Choose Text or File mode depending on your input
  2. Select Encode or Decode direction — the tool auto-detects Base64 input
  3. Pick Standard or URL-safe variant as needed
  4. Results appear instantly as you type — no button clicks needed
  5. Use Copy, Download, or Swap to work with the output

For file encoding, enable Data URI output to get a ready-to-use data URL for HTML/CSS embedding.

features.title: Key Features
features.content:
• Real-Time Conversion: Encode or decode instantly as you type — no button clicks required
  • Text & File Support: Encode any file (images, PDFs, ZIPs) to Base64, or decode Base64 back to a downloadable file
  • URL-Safe Base64: RFC 4648 variant that replaces +/ with -_ and omits padding — ideal for JWT tokens and URL parameters
  • Data URI Output: Generate ready-to-use data:{mime};base64,... strings for embedding in HTML, CSS, or JavaScript
  • Image Preview: Automatically detects and displays a preview when decoding Base64 image data (PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP)
  • Auto-Detection: Intelligently detects if your input is Base64 and switches to decode mode automatically
  • Swap & Stats: One-click swap output back to input, with real-time byte size and character count display
  • UTF-8 Support: Correctly handles Unicode characters, emojis, and multi-byte text
  • No Size Limits: Process text or files of any size — limited only by your device memory

useCases.title: Common Use Cases
useCases.content:
• Data URIs: Encode images or fonts as Base64 data URIs for embedding in HTML/CSS without external file requests
  • JWT Tokens: Decode JWT payloads using URL-safe Base64 for debugging and inspection
  • API Authentication: Encode credentials for HTTP Basic Authentication headers
  • File Transfer: Convert binary files to Base64 text for inclusion in JSON APIs, emails, or configuration files
  • Email Attachments: Encode/decode MIME attachments in email protocols
  • Developer Debugging: Quickly inspect Base64-encoded data in logs, tokens, or API responses

privacy.title: Privacy-First Base64 Processing
privacy.content:
All encoding and decoding happens directly in your browser. Your files and text are processed locally and never uploaded to any server.

  • Ideal for encoding sensitive credentials, tokens, and private files
  • No server-side processing, no logging, no data collection
  • Works completely offline after initial page load
  • Install as a PWA for instant access without internet

url-encoder.name: URL Encode/Decode
url-encoder.description: Encode or decode URL components for safe use in web addresses.
url-encoder.metaTitle: URL Encoder/Decoder - Free Online URL Encoding Tool
url-encoder.metaDescription: Encode or decode URL components. Convert special characters for safe use in web addresses. Free online tool.
url-encoder.keywords: url encode, url decode, url encoder, percent encoding, uri encode
url-encoder.inputPlaceholder: Enter URL or text to encode/decode...

faq.a1: URL encoding converts special characters into percent-encoded format (e.g., space becomes %20) so they can be safely used in web addresses.
faq.q2: What's the difference between Encode and Encode Component?
faq.a2: Encode converts the full URL preserving structure characters like / and ?. Encode Component encodes everything including those characters, useful for query parameter values.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your data never leaves your device — nothing is uploaded to any server.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.

intro.title: What is URL Encoder/Decoder?
intro.content:
URL Encoder/Decoder converts special characters in URLs to their percent-encoded equivalents and back. This is essential for creating valid URLs that contain spaces, ampersands, non-ASCII characters, or other reserved characters.

Use it to safely pass query parameters, encode file paths, or debug malformed URLs.

howToUse.title: How to Use URL Encoder/Decoder
howToUse.content:
1. Enter your text or URL component in the input field
  2. Select Encode to percent-encode special characters, or Decode to convert encoded URLs back to readable text
  3. The result updates instantly
  4. Click Copy to copy the encoded/decoded result

Encodes all characters that are unsafe in URLs per RFC 3986, including spaces, &, =, ?, #, and non-ASCII characters.

features.title: Key Features
features.content:
• RFC 3986 Compliant: Encodes all reserved and unsafe URL characters correctly
  • Real-Time Processing: Results update as you type
  • Unicode Support: Correctly handles international characters and emojis in URLs
  • Component Encoding: Encodes individual URL components (query params, path segments)
  • One-Click Copy: Instantly copy encoded results
  • 100% Browser-Based: No server uploads — your data stays on your device

useCases.title: Common Use Cases
useCases.content:
• Query Parameters: Encode values for safe inclusion in URL query strings
  • API Requests: Properly encode request parameters for REST APIs
  • Redirect URLs: Encode callback URLs for OAuth flows and redirects
  • File Paths: Encode file names with spaces or special characters for web servers
  • Debugging: Decode mangled URLs to see the original text

privacy.title: Privacy-First URL Processing
privacy.content:
All encoding and decoding runs entirely in your browser using native encodeURIComponent() and decodeURIComponent() functions.

  • Your URLs and parameters never leave your device
  • Safe for encoding URLs containing API keys, tokens, or session IDs
  • Works offline after the page loads

intro.title: What is OCR Text Recognition?
intro.content:
OCR Text Recognition extracts readable text from images using optical character recognition powered by Tesseract.js. Upload a photo of a document, screenshot, receipt, or handwritten note, and get the text content you can copy, edit, and use.

Supports 12+ languages including English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, German, and more — all processed locally in your browser.

howToUse.title: How to Use OCR Text Recognition
howToUse.content:
1. Upload an image by clicking the dropzone or dragging it onto the page (supports JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP)
  2. Select the language of the text in the image for best accuracy
  3. Click Extract Text to start recognition
  4. Review the extracted text and copy it to your clipboard

For best results, use clear, high-contrast images with good lighting. Printed text yields higher accuracy than handwriting.

features.title: Key Features
features.content:
• 12+ Languages: Recognize text in English, Chinese (Simplified & Traditional), Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Russian, and more
  • Multiple Image Formats: Accepts JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, and TIFF
  • Powered by Tesseract.js: Industry-standard OCR engine running entirely in your browser via WebAssembly
  • High Accuracy: Best results on printed text, receipts, screenshots, and scanned documents
  • Copy & Edit: Extracted text is fully editable and copyable
  • 100% Local Processing: No server uploads — your documents stay private

useCases.title: Common Use Cases
useCases.content:
• Document Digitization: Convert printed documents, receipts, or letters into editable text
  • Screenshot Text Extraction: Pull text from screenshots of web pages, error messages, or chat logs
  • Translation Prep: Extract foreign-language text from images for translation
  • Data Entry: Quickly digitize text from forms, invoices, or business cards
  • Accessibility: Make image-based text accessible to screen readers

privacy.title: Privacy-First OCR Processing
privacy.content:
OCR runs entirely in your browser using Tesseract.js (WebAssembly). Language models are downloaded once and cached locally.

  • Your images and documents never leave your device — critical for sensitive documents
  • No cloud API calls — zero data transmitted during recognition
  • Works offline after language models are cached
  • Ideal for confidential documents: medical records, financial statements, legal papers

intro.title: What is ZIP Extractor?
intro.content:

intro.title: What is CSV/JSON Converter?
intro.content:
CSV/JSON Converter transforms data between CSV (comma-separated values) and JSON formats instantly. Convert spreadsheet data to JSON arrays for APIs, or transform JSON datasets into CSV for Excel or Google Sheets.

Handles headers, quoted fields, and custom delimiters — all in your browser with no data uploaded.

howToUse.title: How to Use CSV/JSON Converter
howToUse.content:
1. Paste your CSV or JSON data into the input area
  2. Select the conversion direction: CSV → JSON or JSON → CSV
  3. The converted result appears instantly in the output area
  4. Copy the result or download it as a file

CSV input should use the first row as column headers. JSON input should be an array of objects with consistent keys.

features.title: Key Features
features.content:

hash-generator.metaDescription: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512, SHA-3, CRC32 hashes and HMAC for text and files. Real-time computation, hash verification, batch file hashing. Free online tool.
hash-generator.keywords: hash generator, md5, sha256, sha512, sha3, crc32, hmac, file hash, checksum calculator, hash verification
hash-generator.secretKeyDescription: Secret key for HMAC authentication. Supports SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512.

faq.a1: MD5, CRC32, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512, SHA3-256, and SHA3-512 are all computed simultaneously. SHA algorithms use the browser's Web Crypto API, while MD5, CRC32, and SHA-3 use optimized JavaScript implementations.
faq.a2: Yes, switch to File mode and drop any file. You can also hash multiple files at once with batch processing. The hash is computed locally in your browser — the file is never uploaded.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your data never leaves your device — nothing is uploaded to any server.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.
faq.q6: Is MD5 still safe to use?
faq.a6: MD5 is cryptographically broken and should not be used for security purposes. However, it remains widely used for checksums and file integrity verification where collision resistance is not critical.
faq.a7: HMAC (Hash-based Message Authentication Code) combines a hash function with a secret key to produce a message authentication code. It's used to verify both data integrity and authenticity. Switch to HMAC mode and enter your secret key to compute HMAC values.
faq.a8: After computing hashes, paste an expected hash value in the verification field. The tool automatically compares it against all computed hashes and shows which algorithm matches, if any. The comparison is case-insensitive.

f1.title: 8 Hash Algorithms in One Click
f1.description: Compute MD5, CRC32, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512, SHA3-256, and SHA3-512 simultaneously. All results appear instantly — no need to run each algorithm separately.

f2.title: Real-Time Hashing as You Type
f2.description: Results update instantly as you type with zero-delay feedback. No need to click a button — just type and see all 8 hash values computed in real time.

f3.title: HMAC Authentication Support
f3.description: Generate HMAC (Hash-based Message Authentication Code) with a secret key for SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512. Supports both UTF-8 text and hex-encoded keys.

f4.title: Hash Verification & Comparison
f4.description: Paste an expected hash value to instantly verify it against all computed results. The tool identifies which algorithm matches and shows a clear pass/fail indicator.

f5.title: Batch File Hashing with Progress
f5.description: Hash multiple files at once with a visual progress indicator. Drag and drop files directly — results are displayed per file with one-click copy for each algorithm.

f6.title: 100% Private — Zero Server Uploads
f6.description: All hashing is performed entirely in your browser using the Web Crypto API and optimized JavaScript. Your text and files never leave your device.

intro.title: What is Hash Generator?
intro.content:
Hash Generator computes cryptographic hash values for text or files using MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512, SHA3-256, SHA3-512, and CRC32 algorithms. It also supports HMAC (Hash-based Message Authentication Code) with a secret key. Hashes are one-way fingerprints used to verify data integrity, compare files, and validate downloads.

Generate hashes instantly in your browser with real-time computation — ideal for verifying file integrity or creating content digests.

howToUse.title: How to Use Hash Generator
howToUse.content:
1. Enter text directly — hashes are computed in real-time as you type
  2. Or upload files (single or batch) for file hashing
  3. Switch between hex (lowercase/uppercase) and Base64 output formats
  4. Use the verification field to compare against a known hash
  5. Enable HMAC mode for keyed hashing

For file integrity verification, compare the generated hash with the checksum provided by the file's source.

features.title: Key Features
features.content:
• 8 Algorithms: MD5, CRC32, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512, SHA3-256, SHA3-512
  • HMAC Support: Keyed hashing with SHA algorithms for message authentication
  • Real-Time Hashing: Results appear instantly as you type
  • Hash Verification: Compare against expected hashes with visual match indicator
  • Batch File Hashing: Hash multiple files at once
  • Multiple Output Formats: Hex (lowercase/uppercase) and Base64
  • Copy & Export: Copy individual or all hashes, download as text file
  • File Progress: Progress indicator for large file processing

useCases.title: Common Use Cases
useCases.content:
• File Integrity: Verify downloaded files haven't been tampered with by comparing checksums
  • Content Deduplication: Compare hashes to find duplicate files
  • API Authentication: Generate HMAC signatures for API requests
  • Software Distribution: Generate checksums for your own file releases
  • Security Auditing: Hash files to detect unauthorized modifications

privacy.title: Privacy-First Hash Generation
privacy.content:
Hashes are computed entirely in your browser using the native Web Crypto API and optimized JavaScript implementations.

  • Your text and files never leave your device — critical when hashing sensitive content
  • Uses hardware-accelerated cryptographic implementations when available
  • Works offline after the page loads

faq.q1: How is JSON mapped to XML?
faq.a1: Object keys become XML element names. Arrays produce repeated elements with the same name. Primitive values become text content.
faq.a2: XML attributes are not preserved in the JSON output. Only element names and text content are converted.

Word Counter analyzes your text and instantly displays word count, character count, sentence count, paragraph count, and estimated reading time. Essential for writers, students, and content creators who need to meet length requirements.

Simply paste your text and get all statistics in real-time.

howToUse.title: How to Use Word Counter
howToUse.content:
1. Type or paste your text into the input area
  2. Statistics update in real-time as you type: words, characters, sentences, paragraphs, and reading time
  3. Use the results to check length requirements or estimate reading duration

Reading time is estimated at an average reading speed of 200 words per minute.

features.title: Key Features
features.content:
• Word Count: Accurate word counting with proper handling of punctuation and whitespace
  • Character Count: Total characters with and without spaces
  • Sentence Count: Counts sentences based on punctuation markers
  • Paragraph Count: Counts paragraphs separated by line breaks
  • Reading Time: Estimated reading duration at average speed
  • Real-Time Updates: All statistics update instantly as you type

useCases.title: Common Use Cases
useCases.content:
• Academic Writing: Check essay or thesis word counts against requirements
  • SEO Content: Ensure blog posts and articles meet target word counts
  • Social Media: Check character limits for tweets, LinkedIn posts, or bios
  • Translation: Estimate translation costs based on word count
  • Content Planning: Calculate reading times for articles and presentations

privacy.title: Privacy-First Text Analysis
privacy.content:
All counting is done locally in your browser using simple JavaScript string operations.

  • Your text never leaves your device — safe for analyzing confidential documents
  • No server processing or cloud storage
  • Works offline after the page loads

faq.a1: We support UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case, camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, and CONSTANT_CASE.
faq.q2: Can I convert code variable names?
faq.a2: Yes! Use camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, or kebab-case conversions for programming variable names.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your data never leaves your device — nothing is uploaded to any server.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.

intro.title: What is Case Converter?
intro.content:
Case Converter transforms text between multiple case formats including UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case, camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, and CONSTANT_CASE.

Essential for developers renaming variables, writers formatting titles, or anyone who needs to quickly change text casing.

howToUse.title: How to Use Case Converter
howToUse.content:
1. Type or paste your text into the input area
  2. Click the desired case format button: UPPER, lower, Title, Sentence, camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, or CONSTANT_CASE
  3. The converted text appears instantly
  4. Copy the result with one click

You can chain conversions — convert to lowercase first, then to camelCase for clean results.

features.title: Key Features
features.content:
• 9+ Case Formats: UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case, camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, CONSTANT_CASE
  • Instant Conversion: Results appear immediately when you click a format
  • Multi-Line Support: Convert multiple lines of text at once
  • Smart Parsing: Correctly splits words from camelCase, snake_case, or other formats
  • One-Click Copy: Copy converted text to clipboard
  • Batch Processing: Process multiple lines simultaneously

useCases.title: Common Use Cases
useCases.content:
• Variable Naming: Convert between JavaScript camelCase, Python snake_case, and CSS kebab-case
  • Database Fields: Transform column names between different naming conventions
  • Content Formatting: Convert titles to Title Case for headlines and headings
  • API Design: Standardize field names in JSON request/response schemas
  • Code Refactoring: Rename identifiers when switching between naming conventions

privacy.title: Privacy-First Text Processing
privacy.content:
Case conversion runs entirely in your browser using JavaScript string operations — no server calls.

  • Your text never leaves your device
  • No server processing or logging
  • Works offline after the page loads

intro.title: What is Lorem Ipsum Generator?
intro.content:
Lorem Ipsum Generator creates placeholder text for design mockups, wireframes, and prototypes. Generate classic Lorem Ipsum text by paragraphs, sentences, or words with precise control over the amount.

The industry-standard way to fill layouts with realistic-looking text before final content is ready.

howToUse.title: How to Use Lorem Ipsum Generator
howToUse.content:
1. Choose the unit: paragraphs, sentences, or words
  2. Set the amount you need (e.g., 3 paragraphs, 10 sentences, or 50 words)
  3. Click Generate to create the placeholder text
  4. Copy the result to use in your design or document

Generated text follows the classic Lorem Ipsum pattern starting with "Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet..."

features.title: Key Features
features.content:
• Three Output Modes: Generate by paragraphs, sentences, or word count
  • Customizable Amount: Control exactly how much text is generated
  • Classic Lorem Ipsum: Uses the standard Lorem Ipsum word pool
  • Instant Generation: Text appears immediately with no delay
  • One-Click Copy: Copy all generated text to clipboard
  • Consistent Output: Natural-looking text distribution and paragraph lengths

useCases.title: Common Use Cases
useCases.content:
• Web Design: Fill page layouts with realistic text to test typography and spacing
  • UI Prototyping: Add placeholder content to wireframes and mockups
  • Print Design: Fill brochures, flyers, and book layouts before final copy
  • Presentations: Add placeholder text to slide templates
  • Testing: Generate sample text data for testing text rendering or truncation

privacy.title: Privacy-First Text Generation
privacy.content:
Lorem Ipsum is generated entirely in your browser using a local word dictionary — no server calls.

  • No data is transmitted — the tool is purely generative
  • Works offline after the page loads
